title: jasminum degeneri
intro: Jasminum degeneri, also known as the Hawaiian jasmine or Ma'o hau hele, is a species of flowering plant in the family Oleaceae. The leaves and flowers of this plant have been traditionally used in Hawaiian medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Jasminum degeneri include reducing fever, relieving headaches and nausea, and promoting wound healing. The plant is often prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or topical application to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
